prompt: I just finished my website-redesign project and want to mark it as complete in Obsidian. All the project notes are in 1-Projects/website-redesign/ — there are about 8 files in there. I want to set the 'status' property to 'complete' and add a 'completed' property with today's date (2026-04-24) on every note in that folder. What are the exact CLI commands to do this?
assertions: Uses 'obsidian files' or 'obsidian search' with a path/folder filter to list notes in 1-Projects/website-redesign/
Uses 'obsidian property:set file="..." name="status" value="complete"' (or correct equivalent syntax)
Uses 'obsidian property:set' to set the completed date to 2026-04-24
Provides a loop pattern to apply the property updates to all files in the folder
CLI parameter style is param=value, not --param
